en.High: You believe you have the intelligence, drive, and self-control necessary for achieving success.
en.Average: Your level of self-efficacy is average.
en.Low: You do not feel effective and may feel that you are not in control of your life.

ar.High: تؤمن بأن لديك الذكاء والدافع وضبط النفس اللازمين لتحقيق النجاح.
ar.Low: لا تشعر بالكفاءة وقد تحس بأنك لا تسيطر على مجريات حياتك.

en.High: You are well-organized, neat, and systematic.
en.Average: You show a moderate level of organization.
en.Low: You prefer flexibility over structure and may be disorganized.

ar.Low: تفضل المرونة على النظام وقد تميل إلى الفوضوية.

en.High: You have a strong sense of moral obligation.
en.Average: Your sense of duty is balanced.
en.Low: You are less guided by rules and obligations.

ar.Low: لا تعتمد كثيرًا على القواعد أو الالتزامات.

en.High: You work hard to achieve excellence.
en.Low: You are not strongly driven to achieve high goals.

ar.Low: لا تشعر بدافع قوي لتحقيق أهداف عالية.

en.High: You are able to begin and complete tasks even when they are difficult.
en.Low: You struggle to stay focused and finish tasks.

ar.High: تستطيع البدء في المهام وإنهاءها حتى لو كانت صعبة.
ar.Low: تواجه صعوبة في الاستمرار وإنهاء المهام.

en.High: You carefully think through decisions before acting.
en.Low: You act impulsively and take risks easily.

en.High: You frequently feel worried or anxious.
en.Low: You are generally calm and relaxed.

en.High: You get angry easily.
en.Low: You rarely feel anger.

en.High: You often feel sad or discouraged.
en.Low: You are generally cheerful and optimistic.

en.High: You are sensitive to what others think of you.
en.Low: You feel comfortable being yourself.

en.High: You have difficulty resisting cravings.
en.Low: You easily control your impulses.

ar.Average: تعاني أحيانًا من ضعف التحكم الذاتي.

en.High: You feel overwhelmed by stress easily.
en.Low: You remain calm under pressure.

en.High: You make friends easily.
en.Average: You are friendly in some situations.
en.Low: You prefer to keep to yourself.

en.High: You enjoy being around people.
en.Average: You enjoy social interaction in moderation.
en.Low: You prefer solitude.

en.High: You take charge and lead others.
en.Low: You avoid taking leadership roles.

en.High: You lead a fast-paced, energetic life.
en.Low: You prefer a slow, relaxed pace.

en.High: You seek thrills and excitement.
en.Low: You avoid intense stimulation.

en.High: You are joyful and enthusiastic.
en.Low: You are more serious or reserved.

en.High: You believe others have good intentions.
en.Low: You are skeptical of others.

en.High: You are honest and sincere.
en.Low: You may manipulate situations for advantage.

ar.Low: قد تميل إلى التلاعب لتحقيق مصلحة.

en.High: You enjoy helping others.
en.Average: You help when it is reasonable.
en.Low: You prioritize your own needs.

en.High: You avoid conflict and value harmony.
en.Low: You are competitive and confrontational.

en.High: You are humble and modest.
en.Low: You see yourself as superior.

ar.Low: قد ترى نفسك أفضل من الآخرين.

en.High: You are deeply concerned about others.
en.Low: You are emotionally detached.

en.High: You have a vivid imagination.
en.Low: You focus on facts rather than fantasy.

ar.Low: تركز على الواقع أكثر من الخيال.

en.High: You value art and beauty.
en.Average: You appreciate art to some extent.
en.Low: You are less interested in artistic expression.

en.High: You experience emotions deeply.
en.Low: You are emotionally reserved.

en.High: You enjoy new experiences.
en.Average: You are open to change at times.
en.Low: You prefer routine and familiarity.

en.High: You enjoy complex ideas and intellectual challenges.
en.Low: You avoid abstract or theoretical thinking.

en.High: You question authority and traditional values.
en.Low: You prefer tradition and stability.

ar.High: تميل إلى التساؤل حول السلطة والتقاليد.
